# CloudLedger Costs Domain API

`v1.0.0` · OpenAPI 3.0.3

> The CloudLedger Costs domain — daily AWS spend the Cost Collector pulls from Cost
> Explorer, rolled up by service, account, and day. Read-only.
>
>   * /costs — costsapi (daily spend · service & account rollups)

## Servers

- `{scheme}://{host}:{port}` — costs (local)

## costs:daily

### GET `/costs/daily`

**List daily cost rows**

Daily unblended + amortized spend. Filter by `account_id`, `service`, and a `from`/`to` date window (inclusive). Defaults to the last 30 days.

Operation ID: `costs_listDaily`

#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version` | header | string | — | (default: `1`) |
| `page` | query | integer (int32) | — | (default: `1`; min 1) |
| `page_size` | query | integer (int32) | — | (default: `50`; min 1; max 200) |
| `account_id` | query | integer (int64) | — |  |
| `service` | query | string | — | Cost Explorer SERVICE dimension, e.g. 'Amazon EC2'. |
| `from` | query | string (date) | — |  |
| `to` | query | string (date) | — |  |

#### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200` | A page of daily cost rows. |
| `401` | Missing or invalid bearer token. |

**Response `200`**

Content type: `application/json`

Schema: [CostDailyPage](#schema-costdailypage)

**Response `401`**

Content type: `application/json`

Schema: [Error](#schema-error)

## costs:rollups

### GET `/costs/rollups/by-service`

**Total spend grouped by service**

Sums amortized spend by AWS service over the given date window.

Operation ID: `costs_rollupByService`

#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `X-Api-Version` | header | string | — | (default: `1`) |
| `from` | query | string (date) | — |  |
| `to` | query | string (date) | — |  |

#### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200` | One total per service. |

**Response `200`**

Content type: `application/json`

Type: array<[CostRollup](#schema-costrollup)>

## Schemas

### Schema: CostDaily

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `account_id` | integer (int64) | yes |  |
| `service` | string | yes |  |
| `usage_date` | string (date) | yes |  |
| `unblended_usd` | number (double) | yes |  |
| `amortized_usd` | number (double) | yes |  |
| `collected_at` | string (date-time) | — |  |

### Schema: CostDailyPage

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `items` | array<[CostDaily](#schema-costdaily)> | yes |  |
| `page` | integer (int32) | yes |  |
| `page_size` | integer (int32) | yes |  |
| `total` | integer (int64) | yes |  |

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `service` | string | yes |  |
| `amortized_usd` | number (double) | yes |  |
